description: Correct-but-unoptimized fixed 16-wide inner reduction (out[i] = sum_{k=0..15} in[i*16+k] << (k & 3)). Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the inner k-loop runs sequentially, leaving real PPA headroom. Fully unrolling the inner loop parallelizes the shift-accumulate -> large latency drop without changing results.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
